Water Heater Installation | Chicago, IL

If your bungalow or flat needs Water Heater Installation in Chicago, IL, contact Plumbers 911 to resolve your issues quickly.

Our homes offer a break from the day’s responsibilities. Along with the security it provides, homeownership also includes maintenance and repair circumstances such as a water heater malfunction that can take you by surprise and cause a major disruption. 

Plumbers 911 is a referral service that helps remove some of the stress that often accompanies unexpected plumbing problems. We work with a network of top-rated professionals who manage a wide range of plumbing issues, including water heater installation. 

Whether you reside in Little Village or Highland Park, Plumbers 911 provides a selection of licensed, bonded and insured plumbers who are skilled in handling all aspects of water heater repair and installation. Contact us today at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) for immediate assistance.

Why You Might Need Water Heater Installation

A water heater is one of the modern conveniences we often take for granted. It delivers a vital resource that benefits our overall health and well-being. Hot water is an integral part of our daily routines that allows us to effortlessly manage basic tasks such as showering, cleaning clothes and washing our hands. 

Some water heater issues may be repairable, such as valve leaks. Other situations, however, require a replacement. You might need a new water heater if you experience one of the following events:

  • The water temperature is not correct. It may be cold or mildly warm.
  • The color is rusty or discolored.
  • You notice a metallic taste or odor.
  • The heater makes loud or unusual noises.
  • Water is pooling around the water heater.

Water heaters rely on either electricity or natural gas as their energy source. If you smell a gas leak, it’s advisable to immediately contact a plumber who’s experienced in working with such matters. 

They identify and repair natural gas leaks. Plumbers 911 will connect you with a reliable and licensed professional who is highly trained in working with all aspects of a water heater install. We offer 24/7 resources to take care of unexpected emergencies.

Water Heater Installation Services in Chicago

If you find yourself in need of water heater installation in Chicago. Plumbers 911 has the solution. Our referral service provides you with a licensed and highly trained plumbing professional experienced in troubleshooting all areas of repair and installation. 

The local contractor will thoroughly evaluate the condition of your current appliance and make recommendations for the appropriate type and size of replacement. Our network of plumbing contractors stay current with the latest technologies and techniques to provide you with the most effective and efficient services. 

They ensure you have the information needed to make the best decisions for your unique situation. Our plumbing contractors want to be part of the solution. They’re available 24/7 to manage emergencies and by appointment for routine water heater maintenance, inspection and repair.

Hire a Chicago Plumber Today

The water heater installation professionals included in our referral services are licensed and insured. Plumbers 911 only recommends plumbers who have successfully passed extensive training and continue to update their skills with ongoing education and coursework. Additionally, each of the plumbing professionals in our network must agree to submit to random drug testing. 

Whether your water heater requires immediate attention on a holiday or you want to schedule maintenance, our contractors are available to provide the solutions you need. A Plumbers 911 representative is available to answer your questions and refer you to a plumbing and water heater installation professional in the Chicago area. Give us a call today at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) for immediate attention.

Water Heater Installation Cost in Chicago

Typical cost: $1,500-$3,500 for tank water heater installation; $2,500-$5,500 for tankless installation. We provide free estimates with transparent upfront pricing. Call 833-758-6911 for a quote.

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does water heater installation take?

A standard tank water heater replacement takes 2-4 hours. New installations or conversions (tank to tankless) may take 4-8 hours due to additional plumbing and potentially gas line work.

What size water heater do I need?

For most Chicago households: 1-2 people need 30-40 gallons, 3-4 people need 40-50 gallons, 5+ people need 50-80 gallons or consider a tankless system for unlimited hot water. We'll help you size it correctly.

Ready to get started? Call Plumbers 911 Chicago at 833-758-6911 for a free estimate. Licensed, bonded, and insured. Available 24/7.
